_meta.purpose: Deterministic fixture returned by flag_documentation_gaps when MOCK_LLM=true. Keyed by procedure_code, with a 'default' fallback. Lets Track 1 and the entire test suite run with no Anthropic API key (PRD Section 3.2).
_meta.note: These are illustrative gap assessments, not real clinical determinations.

27447.summary: Imaging is present but the supervised conservative-management history required by the payer overlay is not documented. The conservative-care trial is a blocking element, so this submission would not clear automated review.

gaps.element: Conservative-management history spanning the payer-required window
gaps.suggested_language: Document start/end dates of supervised conservative management (physical therapy, NSAID/analgesic trial, activity modification) covering the full payer-required duration, with response noted at each interval.
Attach signed physical therapy discharge or progress notes showing visit count, duration, and functional outcome.
Add a standardized functional score (e.g. WOMAC) to strengthen medical necessity, though it is not blocking on its own.

99213.summary: Documentation supports the level of service. No prior authorization is required for this established-patient office visit and no blocking gaps are present.

default.summary: Core elements are present; review advisory items below to strengthen the determination.

gaps.suggested_language: Add a validated assessment score relevant to the procedure to support medical necessity.
